findings.message: Route handler imports SessionLocal from db.engine, a low-level infrastructure detail. This enables direct session management in the routes layer, violating the layering between routes and persistence.
findings.suggestion: Remove SessionLocal from imports. Use the repository layer (db.repository.create_item) instead of direct session management.

findings.message: Route handler opens its own database session and performs ORM operations directly (session.add, session.refresh), bypassing the repository layer. This is a layering violation that duplicates logic already present in db.repository.create_item().
findings.suggestion: Refactor to inject a session via FastAPI dependency (like get_items does with SessionDep) and call db.repository.create_item(session, payload.name) instead of opening a new session and performing ORM operations directly.
